# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

```yaml
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-server-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  allowedIngress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - port: 8080
      protocol: TCP

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-auth-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  action: Allow
  rules:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    operations:
    - read
    - write

apiVersion: install.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdConfig
metadata:
  name: config
spec:
  proxy:
    image: linkerd/proxy:stable-2.10.7
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "50Mi"
        cpu: "100m"
      limits:
        memory: "100Mi"
        cpu: "200m"

apiVersion: install.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdControlPlane
metadata:
  name: control-plane
spec:
  image: linkerd/linkerd-controller:stable-2.10.7
  identity:
    issuer:
      kind: KubernetesIssuer

apiVersion: install.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdDataPlaneProfile
metadata:
  name: profile
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: my-app
  proxyConfig:
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "50Mi"
        cpu: "100m"
      limits:
        memory: "100Mi"
        cpu: "200m"

apiVersion: install.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdDataPlaneProfile
metadata:
  name: profile
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: my-app
  proxyConfig:
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "50Mi"
        cpu: "100m"
      limits:
        memory: "100Mi"
        cpu: "200m"

      limits:
        memory: "100Mi"
        cpu: "200m"

apiVersion: install.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdDataPlaneProfile
metadata:
  name: profile
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: my-app
  proxyConfig:
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "50Mi"
        cpu: "100m"
      limits:
        memory: "100Mi"
        cpu: "200m"

metadata:
  name: profile
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      app: my-app
  proxyConfig:
    resources:
      requests:
        memory: "50Mi"
        cpu: "100m"
      limits:
        memory: "100Mi"
        cpu: "200m"
